response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience, with recent relevant work in TypeScript/Node.js and React at Optilyz and re:cinq, plus current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks). Strong engineering fundamentals are evidenced by TDD/CI/CD practice, public OSS projects, conference talks, and authored testing libraries. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and cloud platforms beyond AWS, but the core stack alignment and demonstrated craftsmanship make this a solid interview candidate.
strengths: Recent, directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js + React full-stack experience plus current AI-agent/MCP work
Demonstrated engineering rigor: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, authored test runner and assertion libraries
Breadth across backend, frontend, mobile, embedded, and DevOps with long OSS track record
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears dated (robotics/NI era)
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective deployment
